titleStmt.title: SII 24.328: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 328. (A.R. No. 46 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the sale of Vaḷavanallūr in Paḍaivīṭṭu-uśāvaḍi, as a sarvamānya village for 400 poṉ to Rāyar Śavāttu Aṇṇappa Nāyakkar, son of Bukkaya-Nāyakkar of Dēvagiri with rights of hereditary enjoyment including the rights of selling and mortgaging. The signatories of the document are Śrīraṅga Nārāyaṇa Jīyar, Uttamanambi, Chakrarāyar, Timmaṇar and Teṉṉavaṉ Brahmārāyar. The record is dated in the cyclic year Paritāpi leading to the year Virōdhikṛit, Chittirai, 26. There is apparently a mistake of juxtaposition or there is an omission of the expression mēl before chellum in the relevant passage of the text, for, the year Paritāpi follows the year Virōdhikṛit and does not precede, as the text would mean. If Uttamanambi and Chakrarāyar, two of the signatories of the record are identical with persons of the same name figuring in the preceding inscriptions, the cyclic year Paritāpi may be equated with Śaka 1411 when the date would correspond to April 20, 1432 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . virodhikṛt varuṣattukku cellum parītāpivaruṣam cittirai mātam 2 10 6 § devakiri
pukkaya nāyakkar makaṉār rāyar cavāttu Aṇṇappa nāyakkarkku paṭai vīṭṭu Ucāvaṭiyil
vaḷavanallūr nāṉūṟu poṉṉāka viṟkaiyil Inta Ūr kākkāṇi sarvamāṉya māka tammuṭaiya
piḷḷaikaḷ piḷḷaikaḷ nammuṭaiya piḷḷaikaḷ piḷḷaikaḷ talaimuṟaiyāka śrīraṅga nāthadevar
koyiluḷḷa Aḷavum candrādityavaraiyum viṟṟum Oṟṟivaittum Aṉupavittuk koḷḷa
kkaṭavarākavum . Itukkut tappiṉār Uṇṭākil gaṅgaikkaraiyile mātā pitākkaḷaik
koṉṟavarkaḷ poṉa pāpattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum . Ivai śrīraṅga nārāyaṇac ciyar Eḻuttu .
Uttamanampi Eḻuttu . cakrarāyar Eḻuttu . timmaṇar Eḻuttu . teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyar Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.328 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
